zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Byrde於大約1485年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可科華士 希斯時，他的父親Aaron Byrde21歲，母親Mrs. Aaron Byrde27歲。他於1505年與Sarah Appleton在英國素福爾可厄爾 斯頓哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1550年在英國素福爾可享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Byrde于大约1485年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可科華士 希斯时，他的父亲Aaron Byrde21岁，母亲Mrs. Aaron Byrde27岁。他于1505年与Sarah Appleton在英国素福爾可厄爾 斯頓哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1550年在英国素福爾可享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Byrde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bird
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a young or a small and slender person, from Middle English brid, bird, burd (Old English bird, brid, perhaps also byrd) ‘bird, young bird’, also ‘young man, young woman, child’.

Irish: Anglicized form of a number of Irish names erroneously thought to contain the element éan ‘bird’, in particular Ó hÉinigh (see Heagney ), Ó hÉanna (see Heaney ), Ó hÉanacháin (see Heneghan ), and Mac an Déaghanaigh (see McEneaney ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘bird’, as for example German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Vogel , French Loiseau , Czech Ptáček (see Ptacek ) and Pták, Polish Ptak .

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Byrde was born about 1485, in Forest Heath, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Aaron Byrde, was 21 and his mother, Mrs. Aaron Byrde, was 27. He married Sarah Appleton in 1505, in Earl Stonham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1550, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 66.

Il a épousé Sarah Appleton en 1505, à Earl Stonham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1550, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Byrdeが約1485年にイギリスイギリススフォルクフォーエスト ヒースで生まれた時，父Aaron Byrdeは21歳，母Mrs. Aaron Byrdeは27歳であった。1505年にイギリススフォルクエアルル ストンハムでSarah Appletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1550年にイギリススフォルクで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Byrde(이)가 대략 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 포레스트 히스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Aaron Byrde(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Aaron Byrde(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1505년 영국 수폴크 에를 스토함에서 Sarah Appleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1550년 영국 수폴크에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Byrde родился около 1485 г. в местности форест хит, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Aaron Byrde было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Aaron Byrde, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Appleton в 1505 г. в местности эарл стонам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1550 г. в местности суффолк, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Byrde nació aproximadamente 1485, en Forest Heath, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Aaron Byrde, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mrs. Aaron Byrde, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sarah Appleton en 1505, en Earl Stonham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1550, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
